scenes.title: Cover: The Premise
scenes.narration: There's a belief that creativity and control are in tension. That to build something expressive, you have to accept chaos. We disagree.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep obsidian background, near-black with a faint warm ember glow rising from the bottom center. Centered composition with generous negative space. No readable body copy in the visual layer — clean field for overlay. Subtle paper-grain texture over the whole frame. Mood: like the first page of a rare book.
scenes.staging_notes: Fade in from black. The two lines appear sequentially — first line settles, then the second line arrives underneath with a soft upward drift. Both lines in a refined serif or high-contrast sans. Hold briefly before narration ends. Atmosphere should feel like a deliberate opening statement, not a title card.

scenes.title: The Founder Note
scenes.narration: When the pipeline is designed correctly, those two things become the same thing.
scenes.visual_prompt: Same obsidian field as the cover. Centered, with a single long em-dash or thin rule appearing above a quote block. Generous leading and tracking. Visual layer is a pure tonal environment — no rendered text. Warm amber-gold accent line. Mood: intimate, authoritative.
scenes.staging_notes: The em-dash rule draws in first from left to right, then the quote reveals line by line with a slow upward settle. The word 'determinism' should feel weighted — perhaps a brief hold after it appears before the final line arrives. No attribution yet. Pacing is slow and intentional.

scenes.title: Attribution Reveal
scenes.narration: That's not a philosophy. It's an engineering decision.
scenes.visual_prompt: Continuation of the obsidian field. The quote from scene one remains in soft focus or at reduced opacity in the upper two-thirds. Below it, a clean attribution block appears — a thin separator line, then a name and a role title. Subtle warm glow behind the attribution. Mood: like the moment a letter is signed.
scenes.staging_notes: The attribution fades in beneath the lingering quote — thin rule first, then the name rising in. Keep the quote visible but visually receded so the attribution feels like it lands with authority. The narration line should feel like a spoken clarification, not a tagline.

scenes.title: What That Means
scenes.narration: Most tools force a choice: either lock everything down, or leave it all open. Cathode was built to refuse that choice.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep charcoal-to-midnight blue gradient background. A horizontal split composition — left half labeled in minimal type, right half labeled in minimal type. A thin vertical line divides them, glowing faintly. No icons, no imagery — pure typographic contrast. Mood: a quiet diagram of a false dilemma.
scenes.staging_notes: The two labels appear simultaneously on left and right, framing a tension. The dividing line glows. Then both labels dim slightly as the third line — 'Cathode refuses the choice.' — rises in the center, overlapping the divide. Feels like a resolution emerging from the tension.

scenes.title: Designed Correctly
scenes.narration: The phrase 'designed correctly' is doing real work there. It means the structure handles the determinism, so you get to handle the craft.
scenes.visual_prompt: Warm near-black background with a faint architectural blueprint texture — barely visible grid lines in deep indigo. Centered layout. A single phrase appears as the primary visual anchor. Below it, a two-line explanation in a smaller weight. Mood: the feeling of a well-engineered foundation.
scenes.staging_notes: The headline phrase drops in first with slight weight — as if it settles. Then the two supporting lines appear in a smaller, lighter weight below, arriving one after the other with a short breath between them. The blueprint texture should be so subtle it reads as atmosphere, not decoration.

scenes.title: What Craft Means Here
scenes.narration: Craft means your voice, your timing, your emotional intention — preserved, not averaged out by the tool.
scenes.visual_prompt: Obsidian background, warm candlelight-toned accent. A single centered column of words — each word or short phrase on its own line, spaced generously. The words feel like a personal inventory. Mood: handwritten in spirit, but immaculate in execution.
scenes.staging_notes: Each line appears individually, drifting up softly from a resting point below. The final word — 'Preserved.' — arrives after a slight pause and sits in a marginally larger or bolder weight. The rhythm of reveals should mirror the cadence of the narration — one beat per breath.

scenes.title: The Pipeline Promise
scenes.narration: The pipeline doesn't flatten your ideas into templates. It gives your ideas a structure they can live inside.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark background with a deep teal-to-indigo gradient. A centered visual metaphor: a thin, elegant vertical channel — like a column or conduit — with a soft interior glow suggesting flow without chaos. Abstract but legible. No text rendered in the visual. Mood: precision with warmth.
scenes.staging_notes: The channel or conduit form appears first as a faint outline, then fills with a soft luminous glow from top to bottom — like something flowing through intentionally. The two text lines appear after the glow completes. 'Not templates.' arrives first, brisk. Then the second line settles in at a slower pace. The contrast in pacing matters.
on_screen_text: A structure ideas can live inside.

scenes.title: Repeatability Without Loss
scenes.narration: And when something works, it works every time. Not approximately. Exactly.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep black background. A row of three identical small glowing marks — like precise registration dots or film-frame markers — spaced evenly across the center horizontal axis. All three are identical in weight and glow. Mood: the quiet satisfaction of exact repetition.
scenes.staging_notes: The three marks appear one at a time, left to right, each landing with a subtle pulse. Then the three text lines appear below in the same left-to-right sequence — one per mark. The pacing should feel metronomic and confident. The final word 'Exactly.' can sit in slightly wider letter-spacing for emphasis.

scenes.title: The Real Proof
scenes.narration: This video is made with Cathode. Every frame, every word, every timing decision — designed correctly.
scenes.visual_prompt: Return to the near-black obsidian environment from the opening. Centered composition. Clean, wide negative space. The visual layer is pure atmosphere — warm ember undertone, grain texture. No image-rendered text. Mood: a quiet, confident closing loop back to the beginning.
scenes.staging_notes: The three lines reveal sequentially — each one a beat apart — and the narration mirrors that rhythm exactly. After the third line appears, a brief hold. The meta-quality of this moment should feel intentional, not clever: this is proof, not a trick.
on_screen_text: Every frame. Every word. Every timing decision.

scenes.title: Close: The Quote Returns
scenes.narration: Creativity and determinism are not opposites — when the pipeline is designed correctly. That's what we built.
scenes.visual_prompt: Final obsidian field. The full founder quote returns centered, in its original typographic treatment — but now it feels earned. Warm amber glow slightly stronger than the opening. Generous margins. Mood: the final page of a letter you'll keep.
scenes.staging_notes: The quote assembles line by line, slower than any previous reveal — this is the resolution, not a tease. After all three lines are present, they rest for a long beat. Then the Cathode wordmark or a single small logotype fades in below, unhurried. Fade to black is the final move. The silence after the narration ends should feel intentional.
on_screen_text: when the pipeline is designed correctly."
